classification_contract.old_cap_role: sidecar diagnostic only; not pass/fail and not lambda selection

closed_loop_contract.optimized_variables: closed-loop policy parameters only for adam/lbfgsb; scalar amplitude only for line_search_known_direction

overall_interpretation: Closed-loop objective-level rows were finite on 60/60 evaluations and produced positive nonzero penalized-gain behavior on 49/60 evaluations. Of those successes, 12 were beta<1 diagnostic rows and 37 were beta>=1 candidate-scale rows. Old-cap ratios were reported only as sidecars and did not enter classification.
